reviews.name: hani
reviews.text:
Do not be fooled by this clinic. SCAMMERS.

The female staff at the front desk is very rude, and their charges change without any reasonable explanation. They should have a specific and fixed price list based on the treatment provided, just like other clinics. Instead, the prices can be changed at will with no clear ceiling rate.

This is ridiculous. Initially, I was informed that the treatment would cost around RM4,000+, and after paying a RM250 deposit, the estimated cost suddenly increased and could reach as high as RM10,000.

When I decided to cancel, they refused to refund the deposit. Enjoy your ill-gotten money. It seems like you've been deceiving people for a long time. I hope this business goes bankrupt soon.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hello, Miss Hani. We'd like to get to the bottom of this issue, as we are very much sure this is a case of misunderstanding (RM10,000 sounds very much unreasonable from something with RM250 deposit and no treatment is priced as such). You most probably have signed up for conventional metal braces and as per term the RM250 is non refundable as it covers the x-rays and study model that were performed as part of investigations prior to treatment. Please contact us directly at 0146326300 to enlighten us more about this.

reviews.text:
This is my 1st time going to the clinic and I got bad experience.during scaling I I had stop halfway due to the injury below my tongue , and only halfway scaling was done and no polishing was done but the charges were for scaling and polishing although I didn’t proceed for polishing . When I clarified regarding this the receptionist he told the charges is still included which I feel ridiculous.

The dentist was even concern regarding charges after the injury he didn’t even apologize and he told you’ll be still charged and you need to pay the amount for scaling . No empathy at all

should trained the Dentist on techniques on scaling …I’ve been for so many scaling and this is the first time I got injured ,And training should be given to the front desk on how to handle this kind of situations .
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi Miss Lavanya.. firstly we are very sorry for the experience u had. We've made a thorough investigation, and confirmed with the doctor that the injury was not there during treatment and is unlikely due to the scaling process. Scaling was almost done before it was stopped upon your request (Dr said only 2 teeth left - and as for that, the very minimum cost for scaling was charged to you). We hope in the future you can reach out to us directly so that we may improve and clear any misunderstanding. We are thankful for your review, and hope you are doing well now. We look forward to serve you again better in the future with our team of experienced dentists.

reviews.text:
Sangat rude! Memang appoitment pukul 430pm plus ni first time i datang tapi masa register dia buat muka penat malas nak layan even lps isi borang dia biar kn aku tercegat situ lama! Takde suruh duduk dlu ke apa. Bila tanya tunggu apa ni dia buat tak tahu and kawan sebelah dia yang bgtahu suruh duduk dlu sementara tunggu dr! Kawan i pun dia layan sngt rude, Kalau taknak keje xyah keje! Layan cust mcm xde duit pulak! Sumpah ni last i datang sini, she so rude to cust pls do something!

16th Dec 25
How do you know that I was unhappy the moment I entered the clinic? My facial expression is naturally like that, and it was also very hot outside.

I did not expect your staff to immediately know who I was. I entered the clinic because I was looking for my friend, as he texted me to meet him inside. That is why, if you review the CCTV again, you will see that I was on my phone texting him first before approaching the counter.

When I sat on the chair, I was already called shortly after. I clearly remember that I was the last customer at that time, and of course your staff would have expected me since my friend had already registered an appointment under my name as well.

I hope you will not be quick to judge a customer without understanding both sides of the story — as you mentioned yourself, there are always two sides.

When I approached the counter, your staff already appeared visibly unhappy and unwilling to answer my questions properly. Is this how customers are supposed to be treated?

It is unfair to respond publicly based solely on your staff’s account without first hearing my side of the story.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi Miss Alyssa! Upon further inquiries, yes, we remember you.  The doctor called out your name to commence treatment but you left without saying anything. You were unhappy the moment you entered the clinic. You came in with no greeting, sat down straight away and expecting us to know who you are and to be called straight away for treatment. Out of respect and courtesy (what we always do to everyone) we still greeted you and invited you to register. Both doctors were occupied at that time so waiting is advised. We couldn't recall any unpleasant interactions as claimed, especially with your friend (his treatment started ahead of allocated time). Nevertheless, we are deeply sorry if you feel that way. We always aim to deliver the best service despite knowing that some individuals may be difficult to impress. We just wish the matter can be resolved through honest direct interaction instead of public shaming our staff like this. There's always two sides of a story. Should you decide to visit us again, we always welcome you to prove you otherwise =)

reviews.name: zain aziz
reviews.text:
Antara beberapa klinik gigi di Shah Alam yang dibuka sehingga jam 10 malam.

Mesra OKU dan kerusi roda. Ada ruang bermain untuk anak kecil. Ada air minum percuma.

Pernah jumpa doktor Azri, Doktor Shawal, dan Doktor Sasa.  Semua merawat teliti dan lembut (gentle). Pengalaman scaling yang paling rendah sakitnya. Pernah bawa ibu mertua buat gigi palsu 6 tahun lepas, masih dipakai dan tiada komplen. Konsultasi pada sebelum dan selepas rawatan juga menyeluruh.

Setiap kali datang jururawat dan doktor akan pesan, untuk datang kembali jika ada apa-apa masalah susulan rawatan mereka. Tafsiran saya, mereka ada matlamat peribadi (personal goal) untuk merawat setiap pesakit dengan sebaiknya.

Kudos Klinik Gigi Maju. Highly recommended.
reviews.textTranslated:
Among the few dental clinics in Shah Alam that are open until 10pm.

Disabled and wheelchair friendly. There is a play area for small children. There is free drinking water.

I have met Doctor Azri, Doctor Shawal, and Doctor Sasa. All of them treat carefully and gently. The least painful scaling experience. I once brought my mother-in-law to get dentures 6 years ago, she is still wearing them and has no complaints. Consultations before and after treatment are also thorough.

Every time I come, the nurse and doctor will tell me to come back if there are any problems following their treatment. My interpretation is that they have a personal goal to treat each patient as well as possible.

Kudos to Klinik Gigi Maju. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Sarah Mazhar Iqbal Khan
reviews.text:
Update :

Dr Syaheerah and team reach out to me after seeing my review. I appreciate their effort in rectifying my issue. I know Dr Syaheerah acted in good faith and means no harm. Alhamdulillah she removed my temporary filling and did the permanent filling, she was very gentle, and use numbing gel plus local anaesthesia which help with the pain level for the procedure. She also entertained all our quiries and worries calmly and patiencely.

Hopefully I won't need further treatment, especially root canal. It's too soon to tell but I can only pray ❤️🤲

Went in for scaling. Dr Syahirah saw me and she was very good with the scaling. After done scaling, she did a check up of my teeth, and show me some of the holes, and offer to do filling.
I thought it will be a simple procedure.

Unfortunately I was ill informed. 1st she only showed me on which teeth I have the holes but didn't show me the real picture of the hole on those teeth. I didn't really know how my teeth looks prior to the procedure, since it is on the upper teeth molars.

When she started the process I didn't know that it requires drilling and removing some of the decay inside of the tooth 😭 by end of the drilling she informed me the decay is deeper and by end of the procedure the hole is big as she shows me on the screen and I can literally feel the hole with my tongue.
She said I might need root canal, my heart drop 😭 I wish I didn't agreed to the the procedure in the first place. My tooth was not even infected it was decay yes according to the doc. She suggest to put a temporary filling, which was 100 each tooth, that would only last for weeks.

Now I have to get 2nd opinion, and to look for permanent filling, root canal or extractions.

I'm upset because I went in for simple procedure but ended up worst 370 ringgit later. The whole night I couldn't sleep because I regret doing the procedure. Now I feel tingling on the tooth, I hope I can get it properly filled before it get infected since now the hole are bigger and can be exposed anytime if the permanent filling falls out.

Scaling and service are good
But the rest, unfortunately no 😢
Make sure you are well informed  before getting your teeth drilled.

ownerUpdates.text: Most Invisalign cases at Foo and Co Dental Setia Alam complete in 10 to 14 months. During treatment you wear discreet clear aligners that fit around your life. Remove them for meals. Wear them during meetings. No one will know unless you tell them. Our June complimentary consultation offer closes on June 30. Final slots are still available.

A dental abscess can worsen within hours. Cracked teeth do not heal on their own. Nerve inflammation does not resolve with painkillers alone. If you are managing tooth pain with over-the-counter medication right now, that is a delay, not a solution. Foo and Co Dental Setia Alam sees urgent patients the same day where possible. Call us today.

Paediatric dental visits are about more than cleaning. They detect crowding, bite issues and decay before they become expensive problems. Foo and Co Dental Setia Alam recommends a first visit by age 3, followed by six-monthly check-ups from there. This school holiday, bring your child in while the schedule allows. Ages 3 and above are welcome.

The most common reason people delay Invisalign is uncertainty. They do not know what to expect or what the result will look like. At Foo and Co Dental Setia Alam, we use 3D scanning technology to show you your projected outcome before treatment begins. No obligation. No pressure. Just the information you need to decide. Book your complimentary scan before June ends.

Lingering sensitivity to temperature. Swelling around the jaw. Gum bleeding that does not stop. A tooth that has changed colour. Pain that spreads to the ear or temple. These are not minor discomforts. They are warning signals that need professional attention. Foo and Co Dental Setia Alam sees urgent patients the same day where possible.

Children who visit the dentist early build a lifetime of good habits. At Foo and Co Dental Setia Alam, we create a calm and unhurried environment for young patients. Our team is trained to make every visit easy, fun and completely stress free. School holidays are the perfect time to bring them in with no schedule disruption at all.

Invisalign clear aligners are virtually invisible during wear. In a meeting, at a dinner, during a presentation, no one will notice. At Foo and Co Dental Setia Alam, your treatment begins with a complimentary 3D consultation. You see your projected result before you commit to anything. Complimentary consultations are available this June only.

Tooth pain lasting more than 48 hours is almost always a sign of infection, decay, or nerve involvement. The longer it waits, the more complex — and costlythe treatment becomes. At Foo & Co. Dental Setia Alam, same day emergency appointments are available for Setia Alam residents. Call us before it gets worse.

reviews.name: Azman Faris
reviews.text:
Had a wonderful experience with Dr. Alyssa and the staff. She explained the scaling and whitening process very clearly, and also gave me tips on how to best take care of my newly whitened teeth. Prices are a bargain for the service provided. Would highly recommend coming here.

22/6/26 Update: Came again because I had swelling in my gums and it had become quite painful to chew. Dr. Alyssa attended to me once more and, just like my previous visit, she was incredibly gentle, patient, and professional throughout the treatment. She took the time to thoroughly explain what was causing the issue, the treatment options available, and what I could expect during the recovery process.

What I appreciated most was how reassuring she was. Dental visits can be stressful when you’re already in pain, but she made the entire experience comfortable and put me at ease from the moment I sat in the chair. The treatment was carried out carefully and efficiently, and she also provided clear aftercare advice to help prevent the issue from recurring.

The staff were friendly and accommodating as always, and the overall level of care was excellent. It’s rare to find a dentist who combines technical skill with such a gentle and caring approach. I’m very glad I chose this clinic and would not hesitate to return again. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a trustworthy and attentive dentist.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much Mr Azman Faris 👍🏻 hope youre happy with our services 😄 see you again 👌🏻😁

reviews.name: Lily Moly
reviews.text:
Honest review from a former patient who completed 4 years of braces treatment at this clinic.

While I appreciate the time and effort put into my treatment, I unfortunately cannot recommend this clinic for braces.

Throughout the treatment, I found the approach to be rather rough and explanations regarding my dental progress were often minimal. Some aspects of the treatment felt rushed or careless for example, rubber bands were occasionally not installed properly, and bands or brackets would come off just days after being installed.

Additionally, I felt disappointed by how my concerns were addressed during monthly check-ups. Some of my questions were dismissed without proper explanation, which left me feeling unheard as a patient.

Unfortunately, the final results of the braces did not meet my expectations. For those considering braces, I would recommend seeking treatment from a specialised orthodontic clinic for better care and communication. Thank you.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Ms lily, 
Thank you for taking the time to share your honest feedback. We’re truly sorry to hear that your experience with us did not meet your expectations,

It’s concerning to hear that you felt rushed or unheard during your visits, we will take this seriously and continue to improve. There are certain unavoidable issues that all orthodontists may encounter—for example, bands or brackets occasionally coming off is a common issue we often face due to occlusion factor, fmanufacturing defect, tooth movement and frequent missed appointments that lead to calculus buildup, which may contribute to this issue as well.

Our doctor is highly experienced, with over 20 years of providing braces treatment. You’re always welcome to share any concerns or dissatisfaction prior debonding—sometimes, miscommunication or a lack of explanation can lead to misunderstandings about certain procedures. We regret that the final outcome did not align with your hopes. Your concerns have been taken seriously to ensure we continue to improve. 

Again, sorry and thank you for your feedback. We wish you all the best moving forward.
Warm regards.

reviews.name: Faridah Jamaludin
reviews.text: Saya tahu memang makan masa untuk appointment dan check-up di klinik kerajaan, tapi saya call untuk dapatkan kepastian kenapa booking tak available langsung — sampai tarikh dua tahun depan pun not available. Bila call, PIC yang angkat herdik dan cakap boleh je booking, takkan tak ada sampai setahun. Tapi bila saya nyatakan memang tak boleh, kenapa pihak klinik tak boleh semak yang memang tak boleh buat appointment langsung? Saya disuruh pergi ke klinik di UTC, tapi kalau nak ikut sistem booking, macam mana nak booking kalau dalam apps pun tak available? Pihak klinik mungkin perlu lebih cakna bila dapat panggilan — semak dulu sama ada application crash atau booking ditutup, bukannya marah pesakit sewenangnya tanpa usul periksa.
reviews.textTranslated: I know it takes time to make an appointment and check-up at a government clinic, but I called to find out why bookings weren't available at all — they weren't available until two years ago. When I called, the PIC was rude and said that bookings were okay, and that there wouldn't be any for a year. But when I said that it really wasn't, why couldn't the clinic check when they couldn't make an appointment at all? I was told to go to the clinic at UTC, but if I wanted to follow the booking system, how could I book if it wasn't available even on the app? The clinic probably needs to be more careful when they get a call — first check whether the application crashed or the booking was closed, instead of getting angry at the patient without asking for a check.

I’m one of the customers at Tasek Dental Clinic. I was previously under Dr. Wani’s care, and I honestly felt much more comfortable and confident with her treatment compared to the new doctor.

Unfortunately, my experience with the new doctor has been disappointing. There were several small mistakes during my treatment, and I felt that my concerns were not properly acknowledged. The work also did not feel properly done, which made me lose confidence and feel uncomfortable. What upset me the most was the lack of explanation about my treatment progress, which left me feeling confused and clueless during the session.

I hope the clinic can improve communication and patient care, as these are very important for patients to feel comfortable and reassured during treatment. I also sincerely hope Dr. Wani will return, as I truly appreciated her professionalism and the way she made patients feel at ease.

Apabila sy cuba nasib, try dtg kat  klinik suhaila, dr suhaila pun ada menerangjan risiko mmg tak tahan lama tampal sbb nak kena buat rawatan akar. TP boleh jer tampal sementara. Sy pun tak fikir panjang, buat jer tampalan biasa.

Setelah tampal gigi,  saya rasai perbezaan kepakaran dr suhaila dari segi cara dia dril, cara dia tampal, agak makan masa berbanding klinik sebelah yg mcm nak cepat jer.

DAN resultnya, dari segi ketinggian tampalan gigi dan keselesaan gigi sgt beza.

Walaupun klinik sebelah nampak baru dan moden, tp klinik dr suhaila lebih pakar lagi pendapat saya dari segi hasil kerja dan pengalaman.

Dr pun ada terangkan sy perlu nanti buat rawatan akar dan boleh fikir dulu samada nak buat di swasta atau di kerajaan.

Good job Dr. Suhaila.
reviews.textTranslated:
Before this, I went to the clinic next door to have my wisdom teeth filled. But the filling wasn't very good because I did it twice and it felt like the height of the teeth wasn't the same. When I wanted to do it a third time, the dentist at the clinic next door said that I couldn't fill it anymore. I was quite disappointed because it's really hard to have cavities and food residue gets stuck.

When I tried my luck, I tried going to Suhaila's clinic, Dr. Suhaila also explained the risk that the filling wouldn't last long because I had to have root canal treatment. But it was only temporary. I didn't think about it too much, I just did a regular filling.

After filling my teeth, I felt the difference in Dr. Suhaila's expertise in terms of the way she drilled, the way she filled them, it was a bit time-consuming compared to the clinic next door which seemed to be quick.

AND the result, in terms of the height of the filling and the comfort of the teeth, was very different.

Although the clinic next door looks new and modern, Dr. Suhaila's clinic is more expert in my opinion in terms of work results and experience.

The doctor also explained that I need to have root canal treatment later and I can think about whether to have it done in the private sector or in the government.

Good job Dr. Suhaila.
